description: Accounts Receivable & Billing — customer invoicing, payment tracking, aging reports, and collection workflows for charter operations with Stripe integration

hard_stops.label: Invoice Exceeds Quoted Amount
hard_stops.logic: Invoice amount exceeds the original quoted amount without a documented change order — potential DOT unfair/deceptive practice per 14 CFR 399

hard_stops.label: Billing to Suspended Account
hard_stops.logic: Attempting to generate an invoice or accept a booking for a customer account that is suspended

soft_flags.label: Payment Overdue 30+ Days
soft_flags.logic: Customer payment is more than 30 days past due — initiate collection workflow

soft_flags.label: Account Approaching Credit Limit
soft_flags.logic: Customer account outstanding balance is approaching the operator-configured credit limit

soft_flags.label: Billing Discrepancy Detected
soft_flags.logic: Difference detected between mission costs and billing records — requires reconciliation

soft_flags.label: Refund Request Pending
soft_flags.logic: Customer has submitted a refund request that has not been processed
